Title: Audit unwrap() in production code
Description: ~50+ source files use .unwrap() outside test modules creating panic risk. Replace with ?, .unwrap_or_default(), or explicit expect("reason").
Acceptance Criteria: Zero unwrap() in non-test src/ code (grep filtered to non-test = 0)

Title: Add code coverage to CI
Description: No coverage measurement exists. Integrate cargo-tarpaulin into CI and upload to Codecov. Set minimum threshold (60%).
Acceptance Criteria: cargo tarpaulin runs in CI; coverage badge visible; PR gate active

Title: Add automated benchmarks
Description: Performance claims (startup <10ms, <5MB RAM) are not validated in CI. Add Criterion benchmarks for key metrics.
Acceptance Criteria: cargo bench runs in CI with regression detection; results in artifacts

Title: Cross-platform CI testing
Description: Tests run only on ubuntu-latest. Release targets 4 platforms but tests don't validate macOS or Windows.
Acceptance Criteria: Tests pass on ubuntu + macos + windows CI runners

Title: Add API versioning
Description: Gateway endpoints (/health, /pair, /webhook) have no version prefix. Add /v1/ for future compatibility.
Acceptance Criteria: All gateway endpoints prefixed with /v1/; old paths redirect or 404

Title: Create operational runbooks
Description: No formal deployment rollback or incident response documentation exists.
Acceptance Criteria: Runbook docs in docs/ covering deployment rollback incident response

Title: Add E2E and fuzz tests
Description: No full-stack E2E tests or fuzz tests for security-critical parsing.
Acceptance Criteria: E2E test with mock LLM; cargo-fuzz targets for tool-call and config parsing

Title: Deprecate legacy XOR cipher
Description: Legacy enc: prefix (insecure XOR) still supported. Set deprecation timeline and force migration.
Acceptance Criteria: enc: prefix logged as warning; forced migration after N startups or by date

Title: Generate SBOM
Description: No Software Bill of Materials generation. Add cargo-sbom or syft to release pipeline.
Acceptance Criteria: SBOM artifact attached to GitHub Releases in SPDX or CycloneDX format

Title: Publish API documentation
Description: Module-level rustdoc comments exist but no hosted documentation. Publish to GitHub Pages.
Acceptance Criteria: docs.rs or gh-pages hosting with auto-publish on release
